description: MasterCraft DevKit v3 — 8-phase software development pipeline for Claude Code

plugins.name: mcv3-devkit
plugins.description: MasterCraft DevKit v3 (MCV3) — Transform ideas into complete software through a standardized 8-phase pipeline: Discovery → Expert → BizDocs → Requirements → Tech Design → QA → CodeGen → Verify → Deploy. Includes 15 skills, multi-industry support (12 industries), and MCP project memory server.
